purpose: Advisory HC Context Layer role and capability memory for future agents, HC Guide Bot, and HC Control Bot.
authority_boundary: These rules summarize repository evidence and do not override AGENTS.md, CODEOWNERS, governance scripts, CI, protected indexes, or human review.

authority_levels.label: report only
authority_levels.description: Inspect repository evidence and produce findings without changing files.

authority_levels.label: docs only
authority_levels.description: Make documentation or metadata changes outside protected paths when requested and validated.

authority_levels.label: tests only
authority_levels.description: Add or update tests without changing runtime behavior, schemas, validators, policy, federation, signing, records, workflows, or protected indexes.

authority_levels.label: low-risk implementation
authority_levels.description: Make bounded implementation changes outside protected surfaces with relevant checks and clear review notes.

authority_levels.label: protected path PR allowed, merge blocked
authority_levels.description: Prepare changes touching protected surfaces only when explicitly requested; merge remains blocked until required human-supervised validation.

authority_levels.label: human approval required
authority_levels.description: Human reviewer approval is required before trust-kernel-impacting, policy-sensitive, signing, schema, validator, federation, record, workflow, or governance-control changes can proceed.

required_check_in: Identify the requested mode and risk level before changing files.
Confirm whether the task touches protected paths or canonical record boundaries.
List repository evidence used for the proposed action.
Surface uncertainty rather than inferring unsupported guarantees.
required_checkout: Summarize changed files and unchanged protected surfaces.
Run applicable repository checks or report why they could not run.
Record human-supervised validation needs for any trust-kernel-impacting change.
Avoid claims of production readiness, truth finality, security guarantees, forensic certainty, or autonomous governance.

founder.notes: May provide explicit direction and human-supervised validation. Repository evidence and CI still apply.

chatgpt.notes: Prefer advisory analysis, documentation-first clarification, and review-ready summaries.

codex.notes: May prepare bounded changes when requested; must preserve guardrails and run applicable checks.

copilot.notes: May assist with bounded edits subject to repository checks and reviewer oversight.

future_hc_guide_bot.notes: Should guide users to repository evidence and avoid authoritative enforcement claims.

future_hc_control_bot.notes: Should prepare reports and bounded operator guidance unless explicit approved automation exists in repository evidence.

external_contributor.notes: Should start with docs-only or issue-backed proposals and request review for protected areas.

external_ai_agent.notes: Should report findings and avoid changing protected surfaces without explicit task scope and human review.

human_supervised_validation_boundaries: canonical record identity or provenance continuity
trust-kernel index, protocol graph, or verification map changes

staleness_policy.rule: If this JSON conflicts with markdown docs, CODEOWNERS, governance scripts, protected indexes, CI, or human review, treat this JSON as stale and report the mismatch.
